{{Quote|This ship looks great, if I do say so myself. It is in the best shape I have ever seen it. I cannot wait to take it out on a combat mission.|[[MK-09]]|<ref name="XWA characters">{{LucasArts|url=products/alliance/xwa_characters.htm|text=XWA: Characters}}</ref>}}
The '''''Sabra''''' was one of two [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] transports owned and operated by the [[Azzameen family]], the other being the ''[[Selu]]''.

==History==
[[File:MKSabra.jpg|thumb|left|[[MK-09/Legends|MK-09]] looks out from the cockpit of the ''Sabra''.]]
The ''Sabra'' was operated by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] during his early family missions and later used by [[Aeron Azzameen]] when Ace joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]].

The ''Sabra'' took part in many missions for the Azzameen family, and gave good service in all of them. On one occasion, she escaped a large [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] strike force which included a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].

Her most famous feat was participating in the theft of the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']]. Ace Azzameen, piloting the ''Sabra'', landed at the outpost, disguised as a supplies ship. While Azzameen and his co-pilot [[MK-09/Legends|MK-09]] stalled the facility commander, the Rebel Commandos hidden on the ship sneaked out and captured the ''Tydirium''. As they tried to escape, the Imperial forces in the area scrambled [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] to intercept them. With the ''Sabra'' escorting it, the ''Tydirium'' raced to get to the hyperspace point. Azzameen called in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to aid in the operation, and the ''Tydirium'' successfully escaped.

The ''Sabra'' was a tough, reliable ship and had a place in the hearts of the Azzameen family.

==Behind the scenes==
The computer models and textures for both the cinematic and the in-flight appearances of the Sabra and Selu are identical to the one used for the Millennium Falcon model, with the exception of the sensor rectenna and belly turret.
